name: media_type
label: Media Type
help_text: Choose whether to display a video with play button or a static image

name: high_priority_loading
label: High Priority Loading
help_text: Enable this if the media frame appears above the fold (visible without scrolling) to improve page loading performance
inline_help_text: Enable this if the media frame appears above the fold (visible without scrolling) to improve page loading performance

name: video_url
label: Video URL
help_text: Enter the full URL of your video (YouTube, Vimeo, Wistia, or direct video file URL)
inline_help_text: Enter the full URL of your video (YouTube, Vimeo, Wistia, or direct video file URL)

name: video_thumbnail
label: Video Thumbnail
help_text: Upload a thumbnail image to display before the video plays

name: static_image
label: Static Image
help_text: Upload an image to display in the media frame
